title: SkyRunners
description: Developing fixed-wing autonomous aircraft capable of high-endurance payload delivery across campus and beyond.

title: RoboSub
description: Autonomous submersible for RoboSub competition and marine conservation research in partnership with MBARI.

title: Conservation Technology Group
description: Computer vision and drone autonomy to monitor ocean wildlife at scale.

title: The Horizons Initiative
description: Starting in 2026, Horizons will run a campus-wide robotics hackathon annually. In 2026, our theme is UAVs!

title: Combat Robotics
description: Building 30 lb battle bots for competition. Structural engineering, drivetrain design, and electronics hardening.

title: BuilderBot
description: Building a computer vision guided robotic arm for breadboard circuit assembly.

title: Stanford Escape
description: Engineering Stanford's first escape room from scratch — a team of engineers, puzzlers, and tinkerers from Stanford Puzzle Hunt, ACM, and SSR.

title: Humanoid Team
description: Working in simulation to code humanoid robots to perform various tasks, including sports and social activity.

title: SkyBeta
description: Building low-cost microdrones that operate in GPS-denied environments using SLAM and visual odometry.
